_comment: Provenance + integrity manifest for the externally-authored golden corpus. Every .fits is authored by CFITSIO 4.6.4 (the interop/c/gen_sources.c program and/or fpack 1.7.0); the .csv is an Astropy 5.3.x cross-check sidecar. Regeneration is byte-deterministic (interop/README.md). test/golden.zig hashes each entry's bytes (sha256, relative to test/golden/) and decodes each through the public fits API to the expected values. Do not edit by hand: run `make -C interop golden`.

toolchain.astropy: 5.3.4 (numpy 1.26.4) — cross-check sidecar only, never authors .fits bytes

files.generator: fpack -C -r (RICE_1) over a CFITSIO 16x16 BITPIX-32 identity ramp
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/RICE_1; TiledImage.readAll(i32) yields pixel[i] == i for i in 0..255

files.generator: fpack -C -g1 (GZIP_1) over a CFITSIO 16x16 BITPIX-32 identity ramp
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/GZIP_1; TiledImage.readAll(i32) yields pixel[i] == i for i in 0..255

files.generator: fpack -C -h -s 0 (HCOMPRESS_1, lossless) over a CFITSIO 16x16 BITPIX-32 identity ramp
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/HCOMPRESS_1; TiledImage.readAll(i32) yields pixel[i] == i for i in 0..255 (lossless)

files.generator: fpack -C -p (PLIO_1) over a CFITSIO 16x16 BITPIX-16 positive identity ramp
files.expected: HDU 2 ZIMAGE/PLIO_1; TiledImage.readAll(i32) yields pixel[i] == i for i in 0..255

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 26-byte-row ASCII TABLE (I10,E15.7) + deterministic DATASUM/CHECKSUM
files.expected: HDU 2 DATASUM card == 1837006711; checksum.datasum() recomputes 1837006711; checksum.verify() == {data: match, sum: match}
HDU 1 image; ImageView.readAll(i16) yields value[i] == i - 8 for i in 0..31

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 5x3 BITPIX-32 (float) primary image with an IEEE-NaN null at index 7
files.expected: HDU 1 image; raw read isNaN at index 7; value[i] == i*0.25 elsewhere; null_sentinel read maps index 7 to the sentinel

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 3-row BINTABLE (1J INDEX, 1E FLUX, 1D DVAL, 8A NAME)
files.expected: HDU 2 BINTABLE; INDEX=[10,20,30], FLUX=[1.5,2.5,3.5], DVAL=[0.25,0.5,0.75], NAME=[alpha,beta,gamma]

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 3-row ASCII TABLE (I6 ID, F12.4 FLUX, A5 NOTE)
files.expected: HDU 2 ASCII TABLE; ID=[100,200,300], FLUX=[3.1416,2.7183,1.4142], NOTE=[aaa,bbb,ccc]

files.generator: CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 64x64 BITPIX-16 image with a RA---TAN/DEC--TAN celestial WCS (CRPIX 32,32; CRVAL 150.0,2.5; CDELT -6e-4,6e-4)
files.expected: Wcs.fromHeader + Celestial.fromWcs; pixelToWorld matches wcs_refpoints.csv rows within 1e-6 deg

files.generator: Astropy 5.3.4 wcs_pix2world(..., 1) over wcs_tan.fits (cross-check sidecar; NOT a .fits)
CFITSIO gen_sources.c: clean 4x4 BITPIX-16 primary image
CFITSIO gen_sources.c: 4x4 BITPIX-32 (float) image carrying an illegal BLANK keyword
files.expected: validate.verify yields a finding (hdu 1, severity err, kw BLANK); fitsverify also reports 1 error

files.generator: hand-written conformance expectation spec (mirrors the consumer asserts)
files.expected: documents the valid/malformed expectations the consumer enforces
